description: Plan §9 acceptance test: Neighbourhood Reading Room. Pass criteria locked here; golden snapshots {projectgraph,sheet,qa}.json are regenerated only by an explicit UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 run.

gia_m2.rationale: Plan §9: actual GIA within ±15% of target unless constraints justify otherwise.

programme_spaces.rationale: Plan §9: all programme spaces appear in schedule and plan.

model_hash_uniformity.rationale: Plan §10 hard fail: 2D and 3D representing different designs.

a1_page_size_mm.rationale: Plan §6.11: A1 landscape ISO 841×594 mm. Hard fail if missing or wrong size.

audit_provenance.rationale: Plan §6.13 / §16.3: every artefact must trace to a ProjectGraph version with sources.

professional_review_disclaimer.rationale: Plan §12: regulation/compliance content must carry the disclaimer as selectable text.

snapshots.comparison_strategy: Plan §17.3: do NOT pixel-compare renders. Diff projectgraph counts/hashes/areas, sheet SVG element counts and bounding boxes, and qa category breakdown. Allow timestamps and ephemeral asset IDs to drift.
